        MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO..
                         Executive Order No. 614.
          APROPRIATION FOR DREDGING AND WHARF
                              EXTENSION.
                              0. G. No. 3206.
         By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
    of SantoDomingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
    mulgated :
         ARTICLE 1. From the Dominican funds deposited with
    the Guaranty Trust Ccmpany of New York, there is hereby ap-
    propriated the sum of FIFTY THOUSAND DOLLARS.
     ($50,000) to defray part of the cost of dredging and wharf ex--
    tensiog in the Port of San Pedro de Macoris.
         ARTICLE 2. The appropriation of FIFTY THOUSAND
    DOLLARS ($50,000) from the funds of the Dominican Republic
     deposited in the Guaranty Trust Company of New York f o r an
     “Edificio de Aduana de San Pedro Maooris (Parte)” contained
     in Executive Order No. 359, dated December 1, 4919, published-
     in Offizial Gazette No. 3071, is hereby cancelled.
                               THOMAS SNOWDEN,
                          Hear-Adrnjrai, United States Navy,
                        Military Governor of SanCo Domingo..
    Santo Domingo City, D. R.,
    Mar. 19, 1921.
